div.style: display:flex; gap:15px; overflow-x:auto; padding:15px 0; scroll-behavior: smooth; scrollbar-width: none;

article.style: flex:0 0 260px; background:var(--surface); border-radius:10px; overflow:hidden; border:1px solid var(--border);

div.style: text-align:center; margin-top:2rem; padding-top:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); font-size:11px;
